categories.canonical-generated: Generated artifacts expected to be reproducible from current compiler/runtime entrypoints.
categories.canonical-source: Authoritative source files for generated or embedded artifacts.
categories.non-strict-only: Artifacts intentionally retained outside strict conformance; must not be routed into strict-facing paths.
categories.historical-training: Retained training/history corpora and synthetic data; not strict conformance targets.
categories.packaging-embedded: Embedded fallback assets retained for packaging resilience; non-authoritative when canonical source exists.
